406 L1G L1G_NONE_ABOVE (L1G) None of Above Oral Status CHAR 1 Oral/dental status: oral status and disease prevention - none of above. 0 = No, 1 = Yes, "-" = Unknown.
407 M1A M1A_STAGE_1_ULCER (M1A) Stage 1 Ulcers CHAR 1 Skin condition: ulcers - stage 1 in last 7 days. This field indicates the number of stage 1 ulcers on the resdient's body. Stage 1 is defined as a persistent area of skin redness (without a break in the skin) that does not disappear when
